flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Volunteer State Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.1k vs 6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Volunteer State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Volunteer State Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (44.4% → 51.2%).
